data.title: Convert octahedron 'Coming Soon' placeholder node to Story node with Story brand color

data.body:
Follow-up to FRAC-20 + FRAC-36 (Coming Soon placeholder was added at vertex 4 by FRAC-36; FRAC-20 resolved the broader octahedron photo-restoration thread).

After the "Coming Soon" placeholder node was added at vertex index 4 of the octahedron (the previously empty vertex where Political Club was hidden), this task converts that placeholder into a fully functional Story node.

Scope:
- Replace label "Coming Soon" with "Story" (or the appropriate displayName) in NAV_NODES.
- Restore route navigation on tap — should link to the Story route.
- Update node color from the muted/neutral inactive color to the canonical Story brand color from src/data/houses.ts. (Fractal Elegant Story color = #D4BA58 per the FRAC-19 DESIGN.md token house-{story-slug}-{light,deep} pair; verify against houses.ts HEAD before writing — palette values shift.)
- Remove any "inactive" / "non-interactive" treatment applied during the Coming Soon phase (cursor, opacity, no-onClick handler, etc.).

Touch points (planner verifies):
- src/components/three/OctahedronHero.tsx — NAV_NODES definition, vertex 4 entry.
- Possibly src/data/houses.ts if Story's representation needs adjustment (story IS already in HOUSES per locked decision #6 of the design-md handoff — face order: campus, events, lab, school, neighborhood, people, forum, story).

Mobile-first 375px baseline still applies. prefers-reduced-motion still honored.

Does NOT re-add Political Club to navbar — locked decision #5 (Political Club hidden from navbar).

DESIGN.md (now on master via PR #165) declares colors.house-* using displayName slugs; Story's slug is "story" so the token would be house-story-{light,deep} once added. If house-story tokens aren't yet declared in DESIGN.md (verify), add them as part of this task or spin a separate doc-update task.

PASS. Reviewed branch frac-47-story-node @ 9e612a9 cold. Diff vs origin/master touches exactly 1 file: src/components/three/OctahedronHero.tsx (+14/-8). The Political Club placeholder entry in OUTER_NAV_NODES is replaced by a Story entry at vertexIndex: 4 — label 'Story', route '/story', color literal '#D4BA58' (no housePalette call), no comingSoon flag. Surrounding comment block updated to FRAC-5 / FRAC-161 / FRAC-36 / FRAC-47 with accurate Political-Club-stays-hidden / Story-now-navigable framing. FACE_SECTION_MAP and FACE_SECTION_COLORS (story face 7 / #D4BA58) untouched. Navbar.tsx, houses.ts, FractalObject.tsx, DESIGN.md all clean (git diff origin/master -- <file> returns empty). Navbar still hides Political Club via NAVBAR_HIDDEN_ROUTES and People via EXTRA_HIDDEN_HREFS. Static checks: 'Coming Soon' only appears in dead-code consumer branches + the new contextual comment (no OUTER_NAV_NODES entry sets comingSoon: true); '#D4BA58' appears on the new vertex-4 entry AND the unchanged FACE_SECTION_COLORS.story line; 'vertexIndex: 4' has exactly 1 hit (the new Story entry); no Political Club node leaks remain in OUTER_NAV_NODES. Column alignment on the swapped entry preserved (extra padding compensates for shorter hex string vs housePalette calls). Build: pnpm tsc --noEmit exit 0; pnpm build succeeds in 3.48s. Tests: 143 pass / 4 fail — exact baseline, no regressions (failing tests are pre-existing in navigation.test.tsx + neighborhood.test.tsx unrelated to this change). DESIGN.md face order locked at '...people, forum, story' still honored; no house-story-* token introduced. PRD (FRAC-22.md) Story-page architecture supports making Story navigable from the octahedron — no contradictions. Concerns (non-blocking): (1) comingSoon interface field + consumer branches at lines 112/722/742/757/765 remain as dead code — impl agent explicitly scoped this as a follow-up cleanup task, acceptable for this PR but should be tracked. (2) DESIGN.md line reference 'src/components/three/OctahedronHero.tsx:404-413' for FACE_SECTION_MAP is now at lines 410-419 due to the expanded comment block — trivial drift, not worth blocking on. Skipped optional dev-server visual smoke (review env). Verdict: PASS — moving to done.
